faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in New Hyde Park typically ranges from $350 to $650 depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before starting any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours, with adult fleas dying quickly. However, complete elimination including eggs and larvae typically takes 2-3 weeks as the treatment continues working through the flea life cycle. We often recommend a follow-up visit to ensure total eradication.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved flea treatments that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and family members away from treated areas for 2-4 hours after application until surfaces are dry, then the space is completely safe to occupy.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, we understand flea infestations require urgent attention and offer same-day service throughout New Hyde Park when you call before noon. Our team is familiar with the area and can quickly reach homes near the LIRR station, Lakeville Estates, and all surrounding neighborhoods.
